entry.title: New: Reso 25-105 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
"SUPPORTING THE COUNTY'S INTENT TO ACQUIRE REAL PROPERTY IN KAUNAKAKAI, MOLOKAI, HAWAIʻI AND TO EXECUTE A MEMORANDUM OF UNDERSTANDING WITH MOLOKAʻI HERITAGE TRUST FOR THE ACQUISITION OF REAL PROPERTY USED BY THE COUNTY AND OTHER LANDS OF VITAL INTEREST TO MOLOKAI"

Council of the County of Maui

View on the council site
